pages.title: Tailor
pages.text: All Accents wearables. Twenty-eight items. Class-gate only.$(br2)Accents items are dyeable — one base item, many colors via a tag on the item. The trader sells specific color variants; Tailor crafts the base, the player dyes.

pages.title: Hats
pages.text: Captain, Christmas, Cowboy, Kasa, Overtop, Pickelhaube, Pirate, Pumpkin, Sombrero, Straw, Top, Tundra Hood, Wide Brim.$(br2)The Wizard Hat is removed from the game entirely — not craftable, not in JEI.

pages.title: Belts, satchels, quivers
pages.text: Bandolier, Holstered Belt, Item Satchel, Quiver, Sewing Kit, Sheathed Katana.

pages.title: Masks, plushies, regalia
pages.text: Dragon Skull, Skull, King Mask, Horns.$(br2)Cakeman Plushie. Wings, Hermes Boots, Scarf.$(br2)$(bold)Crown$(/) — Chancellor regalia, locked behind the office. See $(l:factions/chancellor)Chancellor$(/l).$(br2)Matching trader: the Tailor.
